==Cathay Generals==
Throughout [[Cathay]], Generals can be appointed to assist you in battle. They can be acquired from [[Cathay INTEL|INTEL]], [[Cathay Cards|card conversion]], and [[Cathay Key Clues|key clue events]]. Each general has a skill that applies to the snail and a unique skill that applies to multiple generals or the snail. Upgrading Generals requires {{RewardIconWithText|Prestige}}, which is gained during normal exploration and can be improved with [[Cathay INTEL|INTEL]].

Generals will die in battle, and be revived in the next exploration, or rarely with 7-Star Lamp once unlocked.

If the exploration is sped up, the '''generals will not die to random encounters along the way.'''

===Recommended Order of Upgrade===
#'''1st Wu General: Qiao Sisters''' to T9 - In explorations, {{RewardIconWithText|Prestige}} gained +10%
#'''3rd Warlord General: Charming Chan''' to T9 - All {{RewardIconWithText|Prestige}} cost -10%
#'''1st Shu General: Madam Huang''' to T9 - In explorations, {{RewardIconWithText|INTEL}} gained +10%
#'''1st Warlord General: Kiddo Kong Rong''' to T9 - Pears gained every 30 minutes +9 (at T9, gain {{RewardIconWithLink|Pear Basket|green}})
#'''1st Wei General: Lady Zhen''' to T9 - In explorations, {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}s gained +10%

Note also that the 7th Shu general, [[Advisor Zhuge]], and the 7th Wu general [[Taoist Yu Ji]] become [[Partners]] after being raised to T9.

==Origins and Final Reward==
Here is a list of all of the generals in Cathay, how to obtain them, and what is earned once they reach max tier (T9). 
{| class="wikitable"
!Kingdom
!General
!Origin
!Max (T9) Reward
|-
| rowspan="7" style="background-color:var(--blue-bg); text-align:center"|'''Wei'''
|Lady Zhen ''Nymph of Luo''
|[[Cathay INTEL#Wei|Wei INTEL tile 1]]
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Cathay Treasure Map, +60}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Byakko Spirit, +3}}
|-
|Guard Dian Wei ''Bodyguard''
|[[Cathay INTEL#Wei|Wei INTEL tile 3]]
|{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +5k}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Genbu Spirit, +3}}
|-
|Cyclops Xiahou D ''Yuanrang''
|[[Cathay INTEL#Wei|Wei INTEL tile 7]]
|{{RewardIconWithLink|General Xiahou D.'s Eye|blue}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Suzaku Spirit, +3}}<br>(Ability to get Eyeball [[Nursery#Chore_Dispatch|Red Chores in Nursery]].)
|-
|Vanguard Zhang Liao ''Wenyuan''
|[[Cathay INTEL#Wei|Wei INTEL tile 12]]
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Cathay Treasure Map, +60}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Genbu Spirit, +3}}
|-
|Counselor Guo Jia ''Fengxiao''
|[[Cathay INTEL#Wei|Wei INTEL tile 17]]
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Cathay Treasure Map, +60}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Suzaku Spirit, +3}}
|-
|Minister Cao Cao ''Mengde''
|Raise the first 5 Wei Generals to tier 9
|{{RewardIconWithText|Seiryuu Spirit, +3}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Imperial Jade, +10 Fragments|orange}}
|-
|Strategist Sima Yi ''Zhongda''
|Complete [[Cathay Key Clues#Kidnap for Power|Cathay Key Clue "Kidnap for Power"]]
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Lottery Ticket, +2|orange}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Suzaku Spirit, +3}}
|-
|rowspan="7" style="background-color:var(--green-bg); text-align:center"|'''Shu'''
|Madam Huang ''Wanzhen''
|[[Cathay INTEL#Wei|Wei INTEL tile 1]]
|{{RewardIconWithText|Byakko Spirit, +3}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Wooden Ox|green}}
|-
|Super Ma Chao ''Mengqi''
|[[Cathay INTEL#Shu|Shu INTEL tile 3]]
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Cathay Treasure Map, +60}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Genbu Spirit, +3}}
|-
|Stalwart Zhao Yun ''Zilong''
|[[Cathay INTEL#Wei|Wei INTEL tile 7]]
|{{RewardIconWithText|Seiryuu Spirit, +3}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Cathay Treasure Map, +60}}
|-
|Brawler Zhang Fei ''Yide''
|[[Cathay INTEL#Wei|Wei INTEL tile 12]]
|{{RewardIconWithText|Seiryuu Spirit, +3}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Cathay Treasure Map, +60}}
|-
|Faithful Guan Yu ''Yunchang''
|[[Cathay INTEL#Wei|Wei INTEL tile 17]]
|{{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +2h}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Suzaku Spirit, +3}}
|-
|Useless Liu Shan ''Gongsi''
|Raise the first 5 Shu Generals to tier 9
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Imperial Jade, +10 Fragments|orange}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Byakko Spirit, +3}}
|-
|Adviser Zhuge ''Kongming''
|Complete [[Cathay Key Clues #Uphold the Empire|Cathay Key Clue "Uphold the Empire"]]
|{{RewardIconWithText|Suzaku Spirit, +3}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Wish Coin|orange}}<br>(Partner [[Adviser Zhuge]])
|-
| rowspan="7" style="background-color:var(--red-bg); text-align:center"|'''Wu'''
|Qiao Sisters ''Beauties''
|[[Cathay INTEL#Wu|Wu INTEL tile 1]]
|{{RewardIconWithText|Gene Speedup, +8h}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Byakko Spirit, +3}}
|-
|Princess Sun ''Hawk''
|[[Cathay INTEL#Wu|Wu INTEL tile 3]]
|{{RewardIconWithText|Seiryuu Spirit, +3}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Cathay Treasure Map, +60}}
|-
|Warscar Zhou Tai ''Youping''
|[[Cathay INTEL#Wu|Wu INTEL tile 7]]
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Cathay Treasure Map, +60}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Genbu Spirit, +3}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|W-tad, +80}}
|-
|Gallant Huang Gai ''Gongfu''
|[[Cathay INTEL#Wu|Wu INTEL tile 12]]
|{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +5k}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Genbu Spirit, +3}}
|-
|Admiral Zhou Yu ''Gongjin''
|[[Cathay INTEL#Wu|Wu INTEL tile 17]]
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Cathay Treasure Map, +60}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Suzaku Spirit, +3}}
|-
|Lord Sun Quan ''Zhongmou''
|Raise first 5 Wu Generals to tier 9
|{{RewardIconWithText|Seiryuu Spirit, +3}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Imperial Jade, +10 Fragments|orange}}
|-
|Taoist Yu Ji ''Taoist of Peace''
|Complete [[Cathay Key Clues#Searching for the Deity|Cathay Key Clue "Searching for the Deity"]]
|{{RewardIconWithText|Suzaku Spirit, +3}}<br>(Partner [[Taoist Yu Ji]])
|-
|rowspan="7" style="background-color:var(--orange-bg); text-align:center"|'''Warlord Generals'''
|Kiddo Kong Rong ''Wenju''
|Exchange [[Cathay Cards#Tier 1 (White)|7 white Mahjong cards]]
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Pear Basket|green}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +80}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Byakko Spirit, +3}}
|-
|Rebel Zhang Jiao ''Rebel''
|Exchange [[Cathay Cards#Tier 2 (Green)|7 green Mahjong cards]]
|{{RewardIconWithText|Seiryuu Spirit, +3}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Cathay Treasure Map, +60}}
|-
|Charming Diao Chan ''Moon''
|Exchange [[Cathay Cards#Tier 3 (Blue)|7 blue Mahjong cards]]
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Cathay Treasure Map, +60}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Byakko Spirit, +3}}
|-
|Healer Hua Tuo ''Yuanhua''
|Exchange [[Cathay Cards#Tier 4 (Purple)|7 purpleMahjong cards]]
|{{RewardIconWithText|Glue, +50}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Byakko Spirit, +3}}
|-
|Chief Meng Huo ''Barbarian''
|Exchange [[Cathay Cards#Tier 5 (Orange)|6 orange Mahjong cards]]
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Cathay Treasure Map, +60}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Genbu Spirit, +3}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +24}}
|-
|Warlord Dong Zhuo ''Zhongying''
|Raise the first 5 Warlord Generals to tier 9
|{{RewardIconWithText|Seiryuu Spirit, +3}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Imperial Jade, +10 Fragments|orange}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +80}}
|-
|Master Zuo Ci ''Yuanfang''
|Complete [[Cathay Key Clues#Yellow Turban Rebellion|Cathay Key Clue "Yellow Turban Rebellion"]]
|{{RewardIconWithText|Genbu Spirit, +3}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Incense, +1|orange}}
|}

==Stats and Skills==
Here is a list of all the generals' stats and unique skills.

===Kingdom of Wei===
{| class="wikitable mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"
!General
!Tier
!Required<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Prestige}}
!Stats
!Skills
|-
|rowspan="9"|Lady Zhen ''Nymph of Luo''
|1
|1k
|Regen 100
|In explorations, B-tads gained +2%
|-
|2
|500
|Regen 200
|In explorations, B-tads gained +3%
|-
|3
|1k
|Regen 300
|In explorations, B-tads gained +4%
|-
|4
|1.5k
|Regen 400
|In explorations, B-tads gained +5%
|-
|5
|2.5k
|Regen 500
|In explorations, B-tads gained +6%
|-
|6
|4k
|Regen 600
|In explorations, B-tads gained +7%
|-
|7
|6k
|Regen 700
|In explorations, B-tads gained +8%
|-
|8
|10k
|Regen 800 
|In explorations, B-tads gained +9%
|-
|9
|25k
|Regen 900 
|In explorations, B-tads gained +10%
|-
|rowspan="9"|Guard Dian Wei ''Bodyguard''
|1
|1k
|CRIT 10%
|All Wei Generals ATK +4%
|-
|2
|500
|CRIT 20%
|All Wei Generals ATK +6%
|-
|3
|1k
|CRIT 30%
|All Wei Generals ATK +8%
|-
|4
|1.5k
|CRIT 40%
|All Wei Generals ATK +10%
|-
|5
|2.5k
|CRIT 50%
|All Wei Generals ATK +12%
|-
|6
|4k
|CRIT 60%
|All Wei Generals ATK +14%
|-
|7
|6k
|CRIT 70%
|All Wei Generals ATK +16%
|-
|8
|10k
|CRIT 80%
|All Wei Generals ATK +18%
|-
|9
|20k
|CRIT 90%
|All Wei Generals ATK +20%
|-
|rowspan="9"|Cyclops Xiahou D ''Yuanrang''
|1
|1.2k
|DMG REDUC 3%
|After death, next General ATK & DEF +6%
|-
|2
|600
|DMG REDUC 6%
|After death, next General ATK & DEF +9%
|-
|3
|1.2k
|DMG REDUC 9%
|After death, next General ATK & DEF +12%
|-
|4
|1.8k
|DMG REDUC 12%
|After death, next General ATK & DEF +15%
|-
|5
|3k
|DMG REDUC 15%
|After death, next General ATK & DEF +18%
|-
|6
|4.8k
|DMG REDUC 18%
|After death, next General ATK & DEF +21%
|-
|7
|7.2k
|DMG REDUC 21%
|After death, next General ATK & DEF +24%
|-
|8
|12k
|DMG REDUC 24%
|After death, next General ATK & DEF +27%
|-
|9
|30k
|DMG REDUC 27%
|After death, next General ATK & DEF +30%
|-
|rowspan="9"|Vanguard Zhang Liao ''Wenyuan''
|1
|1.2k
|Dodge 3%
|All Wei Generals DEF +4%
|-
|2
|600
|Dodge 6%
|All Wei Generals DEF +6%
|-
|3
|1.2k
|Dodge 9%
|All Wei Generals DEF +8%
|-
|4
|1.8k
|Dodge 12%
|All Wei Generals DEF +10%
|-
|5
|3k
|Dodge 15%
|All Wei Generals DEF +12%
|-
|6
|4.8k
|Dodge 18%
|All Wei Generals DEF +14%
|-
|7
|7.2k
|Dodge 21%
|All Wei Generals DEF +16%
|-
|8
|12k
|Dodge 24%
|All Wei Generals DEF +18%
|-
|9
|30k
|Dodge 27%
|All Wei Generals DEF +20%
|-
|rowspan="9"|Counselor Guo Jia ''Fengxiao''
|1
|1.4k
|Wind Mastery 1%
|All Wei Generals HP +4%
|-
|2
|700
|Wind Mastery 2%
|All Wei Generals HP +6%
|-
|3
|1.4k
|Wind Mastery 3%
|All Wei Generals HP +8%
|-
|4
|2,100
|Wind Mastery 4%
|All Wei Generals HP +10%
|-
|5
|3.5k
|Wind Mastery 5%
|All Wei Generals HP +12%
|-
|6
|5.6k
|Wind Mastery 6%
|All Wei Generals HP +14%
|-
|7
|8.4k
|Wind Mastery 7%
|All Wei Generals HP +16%
|-
|8
|14k
|Wind Mastery 8%
|All Wei Generals HP +18%
|-
|9
|35k
|Wind Mastery 9%
|All Wei Generals HP +20%
|-
|rowspan="9"|Minister Cao Cao ''Mengde''
|1
|1.8k
|Ignore DEF 5%
|All Wei Generals basic stats +2%
|-
|2
|900
|Ignore DEF 8%
|All Wei Generals basic stats +3%
|-
|3
|1.8k
|Ignore DEF 12%
|All Wei Generals basic stats +4%
|-
|4
|2,700
|Ignore DEF 16%
|All Wei Generals basic stats +5%
|-
|5
|4.5k
|Ignore DEF 20%
|All Wei Generals basic stats +6%
|-
|6
|7.2k
|Ignore DEF 25%
|All Wei Generals basic stats +7%
|-
|7
|10.8k
|Ignore DEF 30%
|All Wei Generals basic stats +8%
|-
|8
|18k
|Ignore DEF 35%
|All Wei Generals basic stats  +9%
|-
|9
|45k
|Ignore DEF 40%
|All Wei Generals basic stats +10%
|-
|rowspan="9"|Strategist Sima Yi ''Zhongda''
|1
|1.4k
|Lifesteal Rate 10%
|In explorations, INTEL gained +2%
|-
|2
|700
|Lifesteal Rate 20%
|In explorations, INTEL gained +3%
|-
|3
|1.4k
|Lifesteal Rate 30%
|In explorations, INTEL gained +4%
|-
|4
|2,100
|Lifesteal Rate 40%
|In explorations, INTEL gained +5%
|-
|5
|3.5k
|Lifesteal Rate 50%
|In explorations, INTEL gained +6%
|-
|6
|5.6k
|Lifesteal Rate 60%
|In explorations, INTEL gained +7%
|-
|7
|8.4k
|Lifesteal Rate 70%
|In explorations, INTEL gained +8%
|-
|8
|14k
|Lifesteal Rate 80%
|In explorations, INTEL gained +9%
|-
|9
|35k
|Lifesteal Rate 90%
|In explorations, INTEL gained +10%
|}

===Kingdom of Shu===
{| class="wikitable mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"
!General
!Tier
!Required<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Prestige}}
!Stats
!Skills
|-
|rowspan="9"|Madam Huang ''Wanzhen''
|1
|1k
|DMG REDUC 3%
|In explorations, INTEL gained +2%
|-
|2
|500
|DMG REDUC 6%
|In explorations, INTEL gained +3%
|-
|3
|1k
|DMG REDUC 9%
|In explorations, INTEL gained +4%
|-
|4
|1.5k
|DMG REDUC 12%
|In explorations, INTEL gained +5%
|-
|5
|2.5k
|DMG REDUC 15%
|In explorations, INTEL gained +6%
|-
|6
|4k
|DMG REDUC 18%
|In explorations, INTEL gained +7%
|-
|7
|6k
|DMG REDUC 21%
|In explorations, INTEL gained +8%
|-
|8
|10k
|DMG REDUC 24%
|In explorations, INTEL gained +9%
|-
|9
|25k
|DMG REDUC 27%
|In explorations, INTEL gained +10%
|-
|rowspan="9"|Super Ma Chao ''Mengqi''
|1
|1k
|Dodge 3%
|All Shu Generals HP +4%
|-
|2
|500
|Dodge 6%
|All Shu Generals HP +6%
|-
|3
|1k
|Dodge 9%
|All Shu Generals HP +8%
|-
|4
|1.5k
|Dodge 12%
|All Shu Generals HP +10%
|-
|5
|2.5k
|Dodge 15%
|All Shu Generals HP +12%
|-
|6
|4k
|Dodge 18%
|All Shu Generals HP +14%
|-
|7
|6k
|Dodge 21%
|All Shu Generals HP +16%
|-
|8
|10k
|Dodge 24%
|All Shu Generals HP +18%
|-
|9
|25k
|Dodge 27%
|All Shu Generals HP +20%
|-
|rowspan="9"|Stalwart Zhao Yun ''Zilong''
|1
|1.2k
|Ignore DEF 5%
|Self basic stats +6%
|-
|2
|600
|Ignore DEF 8%
|Self basic stats +9%
|-
|3
|1.2k
|Ignore DEF 12%
|Self basic stats +12%
|-
|4
|1.8k
|Ignore DEF 16%
|Self basic stats +15%
|-
|5
|3k
|Ignore DEF 20%
|Self basic stats +18%
|-
|6
|4.8k
|Ignore DEF 25%
|Self basic stats +21%
|-
|7
|7.2k
|Ignore DEF 30%
|Self basic stats +24%
|-
|8
|12k
|Ignore DEF 35%
|Self basic stats +27%
|-
|9
|30k
|Ignore DEF 40%
|Self basic stats +30%
|-
|rowspan="9"|Brawler Zhang Fei ''Yide''
|1
|1.2k
|CRIT 10%
|All Shu Generals ATK +4%
|-
|2
|600
|CRIT 20%
|All Shu Generals ATK +6%
|-
|3
|1.2k
|CRIT 30%
|All Shu Generals ATK +8%
|-
|4
|1.8k
|CRIT 40%
|All Shu Generals ATK +10%
|-
|5
|3k
|CRIT 50%
|All Shu Generals ATK +12%
|-
|6
|4.8k
|CRIT 60%
|All Shu Generals ATK +14%
|-
|7
|7.2k
|CRIT 70%
|All Shu Generals ATK +16%
|-
|8
|12k
|CRIT 80%
|All Shu Generals ATK +18%
|-
|9
|30k
|CRIT 90%
|All Shu Generals ATK +20%
|-
|rowspan="9"|Faithful Guan Yu ''Yunchang''
|1
|1.4k
|Lifesteal Rate 10%
|All Shu Generals DEF +4%
|-
|2
|700
|Lifesteal Rate 20%
|All Shu Generals DEF +6%
|-
|3
|1.4k
|Lifesteal Rate 30%
|All Shu Generals DEF +8%
|-
|4
|2,100
|Lifesteal Rate 40%
|All Shu Generals DEF +10%
|-
|5
|3.5k
|Lifesteal Rate 50%
|All Shu Generals DEF +12%
|-
|6
|5.6k
|Lifesteal Rate 60%
|All Shu Generals DEF +14%
|-
|7
|8.4k
|Lifesteal Rate 70%
|All Shu Generals DEF +16%
|-
|8
|14k
|Lifesteal Rate 80%
|All Shu Generals DEF +18%
|-
|9
|35k
|Lifesteal Rate 90%
|All Shu Generals DEF +20%
|-
|rowspan="9"|Useless Liu Shan ''Gongsi''
|1
|1.4k
|Regen 100
|In explorations, 2x Food Drops +2%
|-
|2
|700
|Regen 200
|In explorations, 2x Food Drops +3%
|-
|3
|1.4k
|Regen 300
|In explorations, 2x Food Drops +4%
|-
|4
|2,100
|Regen 400
|In explorations, 2x Food Drops +5%
|-
|5
|3.5k
|Regen 500
|In explorations, 2x Food Drops +6%
|-
|6
|5.6k
|Regen 600
|In explorations, 2x Food Drops +7%
|-
|7
|8.4k
|Regen 700
|In explorations, 2x Food Drops +8%
|-
|8
|14k
|Regen 800
|In explorations, 2x Food Drops +9%
|-
|9
|35k
|Regen 900
|In explorations, 2x Food Drops +10%
|-
|rowspan="9"|Adviser Zhuge ''Kongming''
|1
|1.8k
|Fire Mastery 1%
|All Shu Generals basic stats +2%
|-
|2
|900
|Fire Mastery 2%
|All Shu Generals basic stats +3%
|-
|3
|1.8k
|Fire Mastery 3%
|All Shu Generals basic stats +4%
|-
|4
|2,700
|Fire Mastery 4%
|All Shu Generals basic stats +5%
|-
|5
|4.5k
|Fire Mastery 5%
|All Shu Generals basic stats +6%
|-
|6
|7.2k
|Fire Mastery 6%
|All Shu Generals basic stats +7%
|-
|7
|10.8k
|Fire Mastery 7%
|All Shu Generals basic stats +8%
|-
|8
|18k
|Fire Mastery 8%
|All Shu Generals basic stats +9%
|-
|9
|45k
|Fire Mastery 9%
|All Shu Generals basic stats +10%
|}

===Kingdom of Wu===
{| class="wikitable mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"
!General
!Tier
!Required<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Prestige}}
!Stats
!Skills
|-
|rowspan="9"|Qiao Sisters ''Beauties''
|1
|1k
|Dodge 3%
|In explorations, Prestige gained +2%
|-
|2
|500
|Dodge 6%
|In explorations, Prestige gained +3%
|-
|3
|1k
|Dodge 9%
|In explorations, Prestige gained +4%
|-
|4
|1.5k
|Dodge 12%
|In explorations, Prestige gained +5%
|-
|5
|2.5k
|Dodge 15%
|In explorations, Prestige gained +6%
|-
|6
|4k
|Dodge 18%
|In explorations, Prestige gained +7%
|-
|7
|6k
|Dodge 21%
|In explorations, Prestige gained +8%
|-
|8
|10k
|Dodge 24%
|In explorations, Prestige gained +9%
|-
|9
|25k
|Dodge 27%
|In explorations, Prestige gained +10%
|-
|rowspan="9"|Princess Sun ''Hawk''
|1
|1k
|CRIT 10%
|All Wu Generals ATK +4%
|-
|2
|500
|CRIT 20%
|All Wu Generals ATK +6%
|-
|3
|1k
|CRIT 30%
|All Wu Generals ATK +8%
|-
|4
|1.5k
|CRIT 40%
|All Wu Generals ATK +10%
|-
|5
|2.5k
|CRIT 50%
|All Wu Generals ATK +12%
|-
|6
|4k
|CRIT 60%
|All Wu Generals ATK +14%
|-
|7
|6k
|CRIT 70%
|All Wu Generals ATK +16%
|-
|8
|10k
|CRIT 80%
|All Wu Generals ATK +18%
|-
|9
|25k
|CRIT 90%
|All Wu Generals ATK +20%
|-
|rowspan="9"|Warscar Zhou Tai ''Youping''
|1
|1.2k
|Regen 100
|Revive once with 10% HP
|-
|2
|600
|Regen 200
|Revive once with 15% HP
|-
|3
|1.2k
|Regen 300
|Revive once with 20% HP
|-
|4
|1.8k
|Regen 400
|Revive once with 25% HP
|-
|5
|3k
|Regen 500
|Revive once with 30% HP
|-
|6
|4.8k
|Regen 600
|Revive once with 35% HP
|-
|7
|7.2k
|Regen 700
|Revive once with 40% HP
|-
|8
|12k
|Regen 800
|Revive once with 45% HP
|-
|9
|30k
|Regen 900
|Revive once with 50% HP
|-
|rowspan="9"|Gallant Huang Gai ''Gongfu''
|1
|1.2k
|DMG REDUC 3%
|All Wu Generals DEF +4%
|-
|2
|600
|DMG REDUC 6%
|All Wu Generals DEF +6%
|-
|3
|1.2k
|DMG REDUC 9%
|All Wu Generals DEF +8%
|-
|4
|1.8k
|DMG REDUC 12%
|All Wu Generals DEF +10%
|-
|5
|3k
|DMG REDUC 15%
|All Wu Generals DEF +12%
|-
|6
|4.8k
|DMG REDUC 18%
|All Wu Generals DEF +14%
|-
|7
|7.2k
|DMG REDUC 21%
|All Wu Generals DEF +16%
|-
|8
|12k
|DMG REDUC 24%
|All Wu Generals DEF +18%
|-
|9
|30k
|DMG REDUC 27%
|All Wu Generals DEF +20%
|-
|rowspan="9"|Admiral Zhou Yu ''Gongjin''
|1
|1.4k
|Water Mastery 1%
|All Wu Generals HP +4%
|-
|1
|700
|Water Mastery 2%
|All Wu Generals HP +6%
|-
|2
|1.4k
|Water Mastery 3%
|All Wu Generals HP +8%
|-
|3
|2,100
|Water Mastery 4%
|All Wu Generals HP +10%
|-
|4
|3.5k
|Water Mastery 5%
|All Wu Generals HP +12%
|-
|5
|5.6k
|Water Mastery 6%
|All Wu Generals HP +14%
|-
|6
|8.4k
|Water Mastery 7%
|All Wu Generals HP +16%
|-
|7
|14k
|Water Mastery 8%
|All Wu Generals HP +18%
|-
|8
|35k
|Water Mastery 9%
|All Wu Generals HP +20%
|-
|rowspan="9"|Lord Sun Quan ''Zhongmou''
|1
|1.8k
|Ignore DEF 5%
|All Wu Generals basic stats +2%
|-
|2
|900
|Ignore DEF 8%
|All Wu Generals basic stats +3%
|-
|3
|1.8k
|Ignore DEF 12%
|All Wu Generals basic stats +4%
|-
|4
|2,700
|Ignore DEF 16%
|All Wu Generals basic stats +5%
|-
|5
|4.5k
|Ignore DEF 20%
|All Wu Generals basic stats +6%
|-
|6
|7.2k
|Ignore DEF 25%
|All Wu Generals basic stats +7%
|-
|7
|10.8k
|Ignore DEF 30%
|All Wu Generals basic stats +8%
|-
|8
|18k
|Ignore DEF 35%
|All Wu Generals basic stats +9%
|-
|9
|45k
|Ignore DEF 40%
|All Wu Generals basic stats +10%
|-
|rowspan="9"|Taoist Yu Ji ''Taoist of Peace''
|1
|1.4k
|Lifesteal Rate 10%
|In explorations, INTEL gained +2%
|-
|2
|700
|Lifesteal Rate 20%
|In explorations, INTEL gained +3%
|-
|3
|1.4k
|Lifesteal Rate 30%
|In explorations, INTEL gained +4%
|-
|4
|2,100
|Lifesteal Rate 40%
|In explorations, INTEL gained +5%
|-
|5
|3.5k
|Lifesteal Rate 50%
|In explorations, INTEL gained +6%
|-
|6
|5.6k
|Lifesteal Rate 60%
|In explorations, INTEL gained +7%
|-
|7
|8.4k
|Lifesteal Rate 70%
|In explorations, INTEL gained +8%
|-
|8
|14k
|Lifesteal Rate 80%
|In explorations, INTEL gained +9%
|-
|9
|35k
|Lifesteal Rate 90%
|In explorations, INTEL gained +10%
|}

===Warlord Generals===
{| class="wikitable mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"
!General
!Tier
!Required<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Prestige}}
!Stats
!Skills
|-
|rowspan="9"|Kiddo Kong Rong ''Wenju''
|1
|1k
|DMG REDUC 3%
|Pears gained every 30 minutes +1
|-
|2
|500
|DMG REDUC 6%
|Pears gained every 30 minutes +2
|-
|3
|1k
|DMG REDUC 9%
|Pears gained every 30 minutes +3
|-
|4
|1.5k
|DMG REDUC 12%
|Pears gained every 30 minutes +4
|-
|5
|2.5k
|DMG REDUC 15%
|Pears gained every 30 minutes +5
|-
|6
|4k
|DMG REDUC 18%
|Pears gained every 30 minutes +6
|-
|7
|6k
|DMG REDUC 21%
|Pears gained every 30 minutes +7
|-
|8
|10k
|DMG REDUC 24%
|Pears gained every 30 minutes +8
|-
|9
|25k
|DMG REDUC 27%
|Pears gained every 30 minutes +9
|-
|rowspan="9"|Rebel Zhang Jiao ''Rebel''
|1
|1k
|Earth Mastery 1%
|All Warlord Generals DEF +4%
|-
|2
|500
|Earth Mastery 2%
|All Warlord Generals DEF +6%
|-
|3
|1k
|Earth Mastery 3%
|All Warlord Generals DEF +8%
|-
|4
|1.5k
|Earth Mastery 4%
|All Warlord Generals DEF +10%
|-
|5
|2.5k
|Earth Mastery 5%
|All Warlord Generals DEF +12%
|-
|6
|4k
|Earth Mastery 6%
|All Warlord Generals DEF +14%
|-
|7
|6k
|Earth Mastery 7%
|All Warlord Generals DEF +16%
|-
|8
|10k
|Earth Mastery 8%
|All Warlord Generals DEF +18%
|-
|9
|25k
|Earth Mastery 9%
|All Warlord Generals DEF +20%
|-
|rowspan="9"|Charming Diao Chan ''Moon''
|1
|1.2k
|Dodge 3%
|All Prestige Cost -2%
|-
|2
|600
|Doge 6%
|All Prestige Cost -3%
|-
|3
|1.2k
|Dodge 9%
|All Prestige Cost -4%
|-
|4
|1.8k
|Dodge 12%
|All Prestige Cost -5%
|-
|5
|3k
|Dodge 15%
|All Prestige Cost -6%
|-
|6
|4.8k
|Dodge 18%
|All Prestige Cost -7%
|-
|7
|7.2k
|Dodge 21%
|All Prestige Cost -8%
|-
|8
|12k
|Dodge 24%
|All Prestige Cost -9%
|-
|9
|30k
|Dodge 27%
|All Prestige Cost -10%
|-
|rowspan="9"|Healer Hua Tuo ''Yuanhua''
|1
|1.2k
|Regen 100
|All Warlord Generals HP +4%
|-
|2
|600
|Regen 200
|All Warlord Generals HP +6%
|-
|3
|1.2k
|Regen 300
|All Warlord Generals HP +8%
|-
|4
|1.8k
|Regen 400
|All Warlord Generals HP +10%
|-
|5
|3k
|Regen 500
|All Warlord Generals HP +12%
|-
|6
|4.8k
|Regen 600
|All Warlord Generals HP +14%
|-
|7
|7.2k
|Regen 700
|All Warlord Generals HP +16%
|-
|8
|12k
|Regen 800
|All Warlord Generals HP +18%
|-
|9
|30k
|Regen 900
|All Warlord Generals HP +20%
|-
|rowspan="9"|Chief Meng Huo ''Barbarian''
|1
|1.4k
|Ignore DEF 5%
|Self basic stats +4%
|-
|2
|700
|Ignore DEF 8%
|Self basic stats +6%
|-
|3
|1.4k
|Ignore DEF 12%
|Self basic stats +8%
|-
|4
|2,100
|Ignore DEF 16%
|Self basic stats +10%
|-
|5
|3.5k
|Ignore DEF 20%
|Self basic stats +12%
|-
|6
|5.6k
|Ignore DEF 25%
|Self basic stats +14%
|-
|7
|8.4k
|Ignore DEF 30%
|Self basic stats +16%
|-
|8
|14k
|Ignore DEF 35%
|Self basic stats +18%
|-
|9
|35k
|Ignore DEF 40%
|Self basic stats +20%
|-
|rowspan="9"|Warlord Dong Zhuo ''Zhongying''
|1
|1.8k
|CRIT 10%
|All Warlord Generals ATK +4%
|-
|2
|900
|CRIT 20%
|All Warlord Generals ATK +6%
|-
|3
|1.8k
|CRIT 30%
|All Warlord Generals ATK +8%
|-
|4
|2,700
|CRIT 40%
|All Warlord Generals ATK +10%
|-
|5
|4.5k
|CRIT 50%
|All Warlord Generals ATK +12%
|-
|6
|7.2k
|CRIT 60%
|All Warlord Generals ATK +14%
|-
|7
|10.8k
|CRIT 70%
|All Warlord Generals ATK +16%
|-
|8
|18k
|CRIT 80%
|All Warlord Generals ATK +18%
|-
|9
|45k
|CRIT 90%
|All Warlord Generals ATK +20%
|-
|rowspan="9"|Master Zuo Ci ''Yuanfang''
|1
|1.4k
|Lifesteal Rate 10%
|All Warlord Generals basic stats +2%
|-
|2
|700
|Lifesteal Rate 20%
|All Warlord Generals basic stats +3%
|-
|3
|1.4k
|Lifesteal Rate 30%
|All Warlord Generals basic stats +4%
|-
|4
|2,100
|Lifesteal Rate 40%
|All Warlord Generals basic stats +5%
|-
|5
|3.5k
|Lifesteal Rate 50%
|All Warlord Generals basic stats +6%
|-
|6
|5.6k
|Lifesteal Rate 60%
|All Warlord Generals basic stats +7%
|-
|7
|8.4k
|Lifesteal Rate 70%
|All Warlord Generals basic stats +8%
|-
|8
|14k
|Lifesteal Rate 80%
|All Warlord Generals basic stats +9%
|-
|9
|35k
|Lifesteal Rate 90%
|All Warlord Generals basic stats +10%
|}

[[Category:Cathay]]
